title: NoPhantom
description: NoPhantom is a lightweight Paper plugin for Minecraft 1.21.x that lets you control phantoms with ease. Disable phantom spawning entirely, or keep them spawning without allowing them to attack players.
body:
💤 NoPhantom

NoPhantom is a lightweight, server-side Paper plugin for Minecraft 1.21.x that gives server administrators direct control over phantom behavior—without affecting other mobs or altering core gameplay mechanics.

The plugin is designed for servers that want to reduce or completely remove phantom annoyance while keeping gameplay predictable and configurable.

✨ Main Features

Disable phantom spawning entirely
Set phantom-spawn: false to completely stop phantoms from spawning.

Allow spawning without player interaction
Set phantom-spawn: true to allow phantoms to spawn while preventing them from:

Targeting players

Dealing damage to players

⚙️ Included Functionality

Simple and readable config.yml with behavior toggles

/nophantom reload admin command to reload the config without restarting the server

Optional admin feedback messages

Configurable prefix

Custom text

Color code support

🧩 Technical Details

NoPhantom is built using standard Paper API event handling and does not use NMS, packet hacks, or unsafe methods. This keeps the plugin lightweight, stable, and compatible with typical Paper plugin stacks.

The plugin focuses solely on phantom behavior, making it easy to use, easy to maintain, and friendly for both small and large servers.
